auth.label: API Key
auth.description: PRTG API key sent as the apitoken query parameter. Create or view API keys from Account Settings > API Keys in PRTG: https://www.paessler.com/manuals/prtg/api_keys

extraFields.label: Instance URL
extraFields.description: Your public HTTPS PRTG instance URL. URLs ending in /api are also accepted.

actions.name: list_devices
actions.description: List PRTG devices with host, status, and message fields from the classic table API.

count.description: Maximum number of items to return. PRTG allows values from 1 to 50000.

start.description: Zero-based item offset for paginated table reads.

objectId.description: PRTG object ID used to restrict the table to that object and its child objects.

filterStatus.description: PRTG raw status codes to include. Multiple status filters are sent as repeated filter_status query parameters.

sortDescending.description: Reverse the selected sortBy column by sending a leading dash.

filterHost.description: PRTG host column filter value or filter expression.

filterDevice.description: PRTG device column filter value or filter expression.

sortBy.description: PRTG device table column used for sorting.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for listing PRTG devices through the classic table API.

treeSize.description: Total number of matching PRTG table rows when provided by PRTG.

prtgVersion.description: PRTG server version string when included in the API response.

raw.description: The raw PRTG table API response.

items.description: One row returned by the PRTG table API.

actions.name: list_sensors
actions.description: List PRTG sensors with status, message, and last value fields from the classic table API.

count.description: Maximum number of items to return. PRTG allows values from 1 to 50000.

start.description: Zero-based item offset for paginated table reads.

objectId.description: PRTG object ID used to restrict the table to that object and its child objects.

filterStatus.description: PRTG raw status codes to include. Multiple status filters are sent as repeated filter_status query parameters.

sortDescending.description: Reverse the selected sortBy column by sending a leading dash.

filterTags.description: Tag name or PRTG @tag(...) expression used to filter sensors by tag.

filterType.description: PRTG sensor type filter value or filter expression.

filterDevice.description: PRTG device column filter value or filter expression.

filterSensor.description: PRTG sensor column filter value or filter expression.

sortBy.description: PRTG sensor table column used for sorting.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for listing PRTG sensors through the classic table API.

treeSize.description: Total number of matching PRTG table rows when provided by PRTG.

prtgVersion.description: PRTG server version string when included in the API response.

raw.description: The raw PRTG table API response.

items.description: One row returned by the PRTG table API.
